caribbean.headline: Roatan Sees Heavy Rain, Rough Seas Today
caribbean.paragraph: Roatan is experiencing winds up to 23 kt with seas near 6.8 ft and an east swell period of 10 s, and an 88% rain probability. I recommend Small Craft Advisory precautions for local operators and caution at Aruba, where winds reach 22 kt.

mediterranean.headline: Mykonos: 21 kt Winds, 5.2 ft Seas
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing sustained northeast winds near 21 kt with seas to 5.2 ft, a dominant NE swell period of 7 s, and less than 10% rain probability. I also note Istanbul is seeing lighter winds around 12 kt; I advise small-boat operators to exercise caution in the choppy waters off Mykonos while larger vessels should expect moderate motion.
